song.title: Love the Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G Love the . Em Lord your God with all your heart, and . C All your soul and all your mind, and . D Love all of mankind as you would love yourself and
[V2] .G Love . Em The Lord your God . C With all your heart . D And all your soul and mind and love all of mankind
[V3] .G We’ve got . Em Christian lives to live, we’ve got . C Jesus’ love to give, we’ve got . D Nothing to hide . G Because in him we all find (love)
[V4] Love the . Em Lord your God with all your heart, and . C All your soul and all your mind, and . D Love all of mankind as you would love yourself and .G Love . Em The Lord your God . C With all your heart . D And all your soul and mind and love all of mankind .G We’ve got . Em Christian lives to live, we’ve got . C Jesus’ love to give, we’ve got . D Nothing to hide . G Because in him we all find (love)
